subcodes.first_line: O thou who giveth voice to praise in extolling thy Creator, hold thou fast to the hem of the Lord of the spiritual hosts and power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الناطقه بالثناء فی نعت بارئها التمسک بذیل رب الجنود الروحانی و القوه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @attaining the life of the spirit, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
